resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def detectCapitalUse(self, word: str) -> bool:
        return word.isupper() or word.islower() or word[0].isupper() and word[1:].islower()
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution checks if the word is entirely uppercase, entirely lowercase, or if only the first letter is uppercase. It leverages built-in string methods for efficiency.
